snippet: The queen was in her cups, Jaime realized. Of late, «Cersei» always seemed to have a flagon of [wine](wiki:Wine) to hand, she who had on...
...med to have a flagon of [wine](wiki:Wine) to hand, she who had once scorned «Robert Baratheon» for his drinking.(wiki:Alcoholic_beverages.cite_ref-Raffc16.7B.7B.7B3.7D.7D...
... Of late, [Cersei](wiki:Cersei_Lannister) always seemed to have a flagon of «wine» to hand, she who had once scorned [Robert Baratheon](wiki:Robert_I_Baratheo...
Casks of «wine» and [ale](wiki:Ale) surrounded them, more than enough drink to see a thirst...
